spec.description: Per-container CPU/memory/network/disk/process metrics (cAdvisor) with a container-picker variable, plus whole-host resource metrics (node_exporter). NOTE: on this dev machine (Colima + containerd-snapshotter storage driver), cAdvisor cannot track real containers - the Containers tab and $container variable will be empty here until Colima's containerd-snapshotter is disabled, or on a plain Linux Docker host in production. The Host tab works regardless.

spec.title: Disk (writable layer vs host root fs)
CPU usage % per container (% of one core, can exceed 100% on multi-core)
Docker Containers
